famous quote:
"But, first, remember, remember, remember the signs. Say them to yourself when you wake in the morning and when you lie down at night, and when you wake in the middle of the night. And whatever strange things may happen to you, let nothing turn your mind from following the signs. And secondly, I give you a warning. Here on the mountain I have spoken to you clearly: I will not often do so down in Narnia. Here on the mountain, the air is clear and your mind is clear; as you drop down into Narnia, the air will thicken. Take great care that it does not confuse your mind. And the signs which you have learned here will not look at all as you expect them to look, when you meet them there. That is why it is so important to know them by heart and pay no attention to appearances. Remember the signs and believe the signs. Nothing else matters."
-- C.S. Lewis (The Chronicles of Narnia (Chronicles of Narnia, #1-7))
Interview Text:
Sarah:

(part 1)

Sarah is a medical doctor, specifically practicing Psychiatry. I know her from church and when I heard her mention she had seen some supernatural things I asked if I could interview her. 

She was in Haiti when the devastating earthquake happened in 2010.
Because she was still in residency going down at the same time as the rest of the group would have been difficult. So she bought her ticket separately and surprisingly because she came separately she was able to bring down more bags of medical supplies than if she had boarded with the group. The first day, Monday, she and their Haitian friend Ricardo unpacked the bags of supplies she had brought. 

The next day, on Tuesday they finished teaching for the day but decided to stay to teach a little more. It was during that time that the earth started shaking. They didn't worry about it very much until it started shaking more and structures started falling.

The church was just pillars with a cement roof and both had been structurally reinforced about a week before. So they stayed under it for protection. Most of the Haitians knew a quicker way to the safe place so they went in a different direction, but Sarah, one of the other Americans, and Ricardo went towards a wall.

During the quake they moved to a new place and a few moments later a boulder fell in the place they had moved from. 

She said then she felt the Haitian healthcare workers laying on top of them to protect them, She could feel them all touching different parts of her body. But there were so many she was getting scared the pressure would suffocate her. Thoughts that went through her mind were, "I'm ready to meet Jesus. But I hope my friend doesn't die because she just got engaged. Oh, but my parents would be sad, so maybe I shouldn't be so eager to die either." All this to say it was serious.

Finally the shaking ended. But when she was ready to get up it was just her friend Ricardo who was covering her and her friend. The others were still on the other side of the campus. Sarah believes it was angels on them protecting them. This was the first time she felt angels.
Music Video Instructions: Though people let you down, have faith in God.
